name: arscontexta
description: Agent-native knowledge-system architecture and Obsidian vault workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Operate and maintain an agent-native Obsidian knowledge system.
interface.longDescription: Ars Contexta provides Codex skills for deriving, maintaining, querying, and evolving a local markdown knowledge graph, with Obsidian-friendly conventions and agent-native workflows.
defaultPrompt: Run an Ars Contexta health check.
Set up Ars Contexta for my vault.
Process this source into my knowledge graph.
